channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 5 Jul: Harare overcast · high 22° / low 12°
item.description: Harare: high 22°, low 12° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 24°, low 10° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 13° (overcast) · Gweru: high 23°, low 11° (partly cloudy) · Masvingo: high 24°, low 12° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 27°, low 13° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Kamoto kamberevere kakapisa matanda mberi. (Small issues can grow into big problems.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
